title: Vercel Flags no longer requires SDK Keys for Vercel deployments
summary: Vercel Flags no longer requires SDK Keys for Vercel deployments
whyItMatters: New projects using Vercel Flags no longer need to configure SDK Keys or the FLAGS environment variable when evaluating flags inside a Vercel deployment. At runtime, the Vercel adapter automatically receives a short-lived OIDC token, so authentication is handled for you with zero configuration.
